channel.title: NAS Zheng, JP Baak, S Li, W Xiao, H Ren, H Yang, Y Gan, C Wen | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAS Zheng, JP Baak, S Li, W Xiao, H Ren, H Yang, Y Gan, C Wen

image.title: NAS Zheng, JP Baak, S Li, W Xiao, H Ren, H Yang, Y Gan, C Wen

item.title: Network pharmacology analysis of the therapeutic mechanisms of the traditional Chinese herbal formula Lian Hua Qing Wen in Corona virus disease 2019 (COVID-19), gives fundamental support to the clinical use of LHQW.
